prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: hero poster. Story world: Tape 17: Pinewatch. Premise: A recovered camcorder tape rewrites itself every midnight.. Setting: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels. Threat presence: The Editor. Recurring motifs: timecode burn-ins, camera clicks, forest sirens. Create premium launch key art that introduces player mission stakes and iconic environmental cues with poster-level composition.. Subgenre: found-footage investigation. Tone: GROUNDED. Immediate scene brief: Tape 17: Pinewatch Story Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
source_prompt: Story: Tape 17: Pinewatch (tape-17-pinewatch) | Hook: A recovered camcorder tape rewrites itself every midnight. | Subgenre: found-footage investigation | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Closed wilderness watch station and ranger tunnels | Villain: The Editor | Villain worldview: Reality is editable if fear is timed correctly. | Motifs: timecode burn-ins, camera clicks, forest sirens. Create premium launch key art that introduces player mission stakes and iconic environmental cues with poster-level composition.
